sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115500" key="yeudokathgore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψευδοκατηγορ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n115500.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accuse falsely,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4.34.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
